tagline: Baza ikibazo icyo ari cyo cyose ku buzima bwawe mu ibanga.
consent_title: Murakaza neza — reka dutegure ahantu hatekanye
consent_headline: Ibibazo byawe by'ubuzima, bisubizwa mu mutekano.
consent_illustration_alt: Abakiri bato babiri baganira ku buzima badafite ipfunwe
consent_body: Aha ni ahantu h'ibanga kandi h'ibanga rikomeye ho kwiga ku buzima bw'imyororokere n'imibonano mpuzabitsina. Ntitukubaza izina ryawe kandi ntitubika uwo uri we. Ushobora guhagarara igihe cyose ushaka.
consent_anonymous_confirm: Numva ko ibibazo byanjye bidasangirwa n'undi (ni ibanga)
chat_fallback_message: Ntabwo nshobora gufasha muri icyo kibazo. Nyamuneka vugana n'umujyanama w'ubuzima wizewe.
welcome_prompt: Kanda kimwe mu bibazo byo hasi cyangwa wandike icyawe.
offline_banner: Serivisi ntiraboneka by'agateganyo. Wongera ugerageze nyuma.
assessment_logo_alt: Ikirango cy'Urubuga rw'Uburezi ku Buzima bw'Imyororokere
landing_title: Menya ukuri ku mubiri wawe, ubuzima bwawe n'amahitamo yawe.
landing_who: Ku rubyiruko n'abafite ubumuga mu Rwanda — mu Kinyarwanda cyangwa Icyongereza.
landing_reassure: Amakuru yawe aragirwa ibanga kandi ntusabwa kugaragaza umwirondoro wawe. Iki kiganiro kigufasha kubona amakuru, ariko ntigisimbura ubufasha bwihutirwa — niba ukeneye ubufasha bwihutirwa hamagara 114.
landing_learn_more: Uko ikora, indimi, uburyo ikoreshwa n'abantu bose ndetse n'umutekano
landing_lang_body: Hindura hagati y'Ikinyarwanda n'Icyongereza igihe cyose ukoresheje buto y'ururimi iri hejuru y'urupapuro.
landing_private_body: Ntabwo tugusaba izina ryawe kandi ntitubika amakuru agaragaza uwo uri we. Ibibazo ubaza ni ibyawe gusa, kandi ushobora guhagarika igihe icyo ari cyo cyose.
landing_safety_body: Iyi chatbot itanga amakuru gusa — ntabwo ari umuganga cyangwa umujyanama. Mu gihe cy'ibyihutirwa cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha bwihuse, izakuyobora kuri serivisi zifatika, nka telefoni y'ubuzima yo mu Rwanda 114, aho kugerageza gutanga igisubizo.
landing_how_1: Kanda "Tangira ikiganiro" wemeze ko ufite imyaka 13 cyangwa irenga kandi ko ikiganiro cyawe ari ibanga.
landing_how_2: Andika ikibazo cyawe cyangwa uhitemo kimwe mu bibazo byateguwe niba udashoboye.
landing_how_3: Hindura hagati y'Ikinyarwanda n'Icyongereza igihe cyose ukoresheje buto y'ururimi.
landing_how_4: Fungura igenamiterere ry'ubushobozi bwo kugera kugira ngo unini inyandiko, ukoreshe amabara atandukanye cyane, cyangwa umve ibisubizo bisomwa mu ijwi.
landing_access_title: Yubatswe kugira ngo ikoreshwe na bose
landing_access_body: Gusomerwa n'amajwi, inyandiko nini, amabara agaragara neza, ndetse no gukoresha clavier gusa byashyizwe muri buri rupapuro — harimo n'uru.
